The rebuild

Dance got the attention.
Faith gave it a reason.

"I went from atheist to finally understanding that Jesus is all you'll ever need."

Jackson, the day he got baptized · Psalm 149:3

Self-taught in Charlotte. Viral off a move nobody could copy right. Around the world through fashion and music. Then home, to build something that means something.

01

Self-taught

No studio, no cosign. Learned to move on camera, one rep at a time.

02

The Jaywalk

A move so simple people copied it, so strange they never forgot it.

03

The world

Fashion, music, Paris, Abu Dhabi. Saw the money and the machine.

04

The turn

Came home. Got baptized. Decided the art would mean something now.

05

The room

Same body, same city, new direction. And this time, he owns it.

The offer

the move is teachableMovement into music.

He turned a dance into a global movement. Now he shows you how to hear movement inside a song and build a moment that travels, whether you're a dancer, a creator, or an artist trying to get seen.

First drop

The 90-minute class

  • Animation basics & the Jaywalk breakdown
  • How to hear movement inside a beat
  • Build a hook move that travels
  • Perform for the camera, not the mirror
  • Q&A + a story-and-faith close
